## Summary

<!-- One to three sentences: what does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

<!-- Tick whichever applies -->

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] Documentation only (`docs:`)
- [ ] Refactor / no behaviour change (`refactor:`)
- [ ] Test-only change (`test:`)
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling (`chore:` / `ci:`)
- [ ] Breaking change (any type + `!`) — requires version bump + CHANGELOG entry

## Verification

<!-- Check every box before requesting review -->

- [ ] `./.venv/bin/pytest` passes locally (or CI green)
- [ ] Updated affected skill frameworks / SKILL.md files if the change touched skill directives
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under "Unreleased" for any user-visible change
- [ ] Updated `README.md` / `docs/` if the change affects installation, CLI, or skills usage
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal paths committed
- [ ] Trailing whitespace preserved in `.md` files that rely on it (banner rows, manual line breaks)

## Screenshots / CLI output (if relevant)

<!-- Paste terminal output or screenshots when the change affects user-visible UX. -->

## Notes for reviewer

<!-- Anything reviewer should look at first, risks, known limitations, follow-ups. -->
